brand.title: Vacuum RL
brand.subtitle: Reinforcement Learning Simulator
hero.title: Vacuum-cleaning robot trained across 5 reinforcement learning algorithms
hero.subtitle: This simulation visualizes DQN, TRPO, PPO, A2C, and SAC policies on a vacuum-cleaning MDP environment with battery constraints, obstacles, and dirt dynamics.
hero.panel.title: Policy rollout
demo.title: Observe policy decisions step by step
demo.description: Select an algorithm, run auto-policy, or send manual actions. Grid, battery, reward, and episode return update via WebSocket.
about.title: Vacuum cleaning as a constrained decision process
about.state.title: State
about.state.text: State includes robot position, battery level, dirt status from local perception, obstacles, and relative distance to the charging dock.
about.action.title: Action
about.action.text: The agent selects from seven discrete actions: move N/S/E/W, Stay, Clean, or Charge. SAC maps from continuous action space to discrete environment actions.
about.reward.title: Reward
about.reward.text: The reward balances cleaning dirty cells, step and movement costs, bump penalty, ineffective action penalty, charging behavior, and a reset penalty when battery is depleted.
footer.title: Vacuum RL
footer.description: Interactive companion for a reinforcement-learning vacuum-cleaner study.
footer.author: Author/contributor: SJH, FAM, CJT
footer.reference: Reference: project paper, Table 4 policy-quality results
info.battery_reset: Battery depleted. Robot relocated to dock.
arena.title: Multi-Grid Arena
arena.description: Run multiple algorithms simultaneously on identical grid environments for fair visual comparison.
